subject: feat(themes): add light/dark variants for all color themes
body:
Each of 19 themes now has independently designed light and dark variants
with accent colors chosen per variant — not just primary/secondary swaps.
Accent colors differ per variant because an accent that works on a dark
background often washes out, clashes, or loses its visual role on light.

- Restructured themes.js: flat colors → variants object with defaultVariant
- Merged old dark/light themes into single 'neutral' theme
- Added variant field to theme state, setThemeVariant callback
- Light/Dark toggle UI with sun/moon icons in Presets → Themes
- Theme swatches show current variant colors, tooltip shows both
- Backward compat: loadDesign migrates old preset IDs and missing variant

Tags: themes, state, ui, config, backward-compat
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-variants
Semver: minor
